features: ORTHODOX CHURCH CANDLES. Every single taper candle out of 50 pcs set meets the highest candle quality standards. With the 30 min burning time, these 15 cm long and 5 mm thick beeswax candles will enhance your meditation, prayer, or religious ritual, and add to your home altar.

NATURAL BEESWAX CANDLES. When choosing tapeWhite candles for meditation, romantic occasions or rituals, be sure to always look for Beeswax Candles. Danilovo thin candle tapers with cotton wick are made from the non-toxic beeswax.
